Container.Name: Translarr
Container.Overview:
Translarr translates subtitle tracks from the wrong language to your preferred language using AI. It plugs into Sonarr, Radarr, Emby, Jellyfin, and Plex via webhooks and drops translated .srt files next to your media.
Features: - LLM-powered translation with context awareness (Anthropic, OpenAI, DeepSeek, Gemini, or local Ollama) - Automatic reading-rate adaptation for readable subtitles - Tag-based opt-in via Sonarr/Radarr: only translates what you tag - On-demand translation when you press Play in Emby - 6 translation presets (Quick & Cheap, Balanced, Best Quality, Local & Free, DeepSeek Budget, Gemini Flash) - Cost guards: daily and per-job spend caps - Push notifications via ntfy.sh - Web UI: dashboard, job history, settings, library browser, glossary editor - All settings are live-mutable, no container restart needed

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port to map to container port 9000 (Web UI and API).

Config.Name: Media Library
Config.Description: Path to your media library (movies, TV shows).

Config.Name: Config / Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for database and settings.

Config.Name: LLM Provider
Config.Description: anthropic, openai, ollama, deepseek, or gemini

Config.Name: LLM Model
Config.Description: Model identifier (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6, deepseek-chat, gemini-2.5-flash).

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: Required when LLM Provider is anthropic. Get one at console.anthropic.com.

Config.Name: Target Language
Config.Description: ISO 639-1 code for target language (en, de, es, fr, ja, etc.).

Config.Name: Daily Cost Cap (cents)
Config.Description: Hard kill-switch in cents (1000 = $10). Translations stop until midnight UTC.

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: Required when LLM Provider is openai.

Config.Name: DeepSeek API Key
Config.Description: Required when LLM Provider is deepseek. ~$0.10 per episode.

Config.Name: Gemini API Key
Config.Description: Required when LLM Provider is gemini. Flash tier is ~$0.08 per episode.

Config.Name: Per-Job Cost Cap (cents)
Config.Description: Max spend per single translation in cents (500 = $5).

Config.Name: Max Concurrent Jobs
Config.Description: How many translations may run in parallel.

Config.Name: Webhook Secret
Config.Description: Shared secret for arr webhook auth. Empty = no auth (fine on a private LAN).

Config.Name: Emby URL
Config.Description: Emby server URL for library refresh hooks (e.g. http://emby:8096).

Config.Name: Emby API Key
Config.Description: Emby API key for library refresh and the in-player subtitle picker.

Config.Name: Jellyfin URL
Config.Description: Jellyfin server URL for library refresh hooks.

Config.Name: Jellyfin API Key
Config.Description: Jellyfin API key for library refresh.

Config.Name: ntfy URL
Config.Description: ntfy.sh push endpoint for job notifications. Empty = off.

Config.Name: Ollama Host
Config.Description: Ollama server URL (for the free local provider).
